# UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES
## Periodic Transaction Report

**Name:** Rohit Khanna  
**Page:** (printed page label partly obscured by "HAND DELIVERED" stamp)

**NAME:** Rohit Khanna  
**OFFICE TELEPHONE:** (202) 225-2631

- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- [ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: ______ (File an original and 1 copy)

**Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering?** [ ] Yes  [X] No  
_If you answered "yes" to this question, please contact the Committee on Ethics for further guidance._

**Please indicate whether this is an initial report or an amended report.** For amendments, please provide the date of the report you are amending.  
- [X] Initial Report
- [ ] Amendment

**Date of Report Being Amended:** ______

_A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late._

Stamps: "HAND DELIVERED", "LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER 2019 FEB 12 AM 11:58" (For Official Use Only)

**Transaction grid:** First data row reads "Please see the attached"; remaining rows blank. Example row (ignored): JT — Mega Corp. Common Stock — Sale — 02/05/2015 — 03/07/15 — column B.

uncertainties.note: Printed page number obscured by HAND DELIVERED stamp; total count not legible
